notes: Passive - reads the #__NEXT_DATA__ script tag JSON (props.pageProps.user) on a Venmo profile page and displays username, display name, Venmo ID, profile URL, and avatar URL in a modal with id 'venmo-modal' and header text 'Venmo User Data'. Uses Venmo's own official 'Venmo' account as a stable public profile. If __NEXT_DATA__ is missing or has no user, it calls alert(...) instead.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with profile field content (username, Venmo ID, etc.)
